title: Expritan Collection
description: Main modpack used by Nonno - Contains the suggested mods for the expritan server + some additions.
body:
## Nonno’s Main Client-Side Modpack

A carefully curated collection of **client-side mods** for improved gameplay, visuals, optimization, and creative tools. Initially built for the Expritan Network, but now it’s Nonno’s main setup. Constantly updated and expanded with essential and fun tools.

---

### 🎨 Visual Improvements

* Fresh Animations & Moves + Extensions!
* Continuity
* Blur
* Visuality
* Not Enough Animations 
* Full Brightness Toggle
* Zoomify
* Xaero’s Minimap
* Xaero’s World Map
* Minihud

---

### 🎮 Gameplay Enhancements & QoL

* In-Game Voice Chat
* Emotecraft
* Shulker Box Tooltip
* Do a Barrel Roll

---

### 🎥 Filming & Cinematics

* Flashback
* Freecam
* Mocap

---

### 🏗️ Building & World Editing

* Axiom
* WorldEdit
* WorldTools

---

### 🚀 Optimization & Performance

* Sodium
* Lithium
* FerriteCore
* EntityCulling
* MoreCulling
* Dynamic FPS
